raw_output:
PR #137 review (Claude, Fable 5). CORRECTNESS: no blocking findings. Verified: badge string accurate for all reachable N vs the backend rolling last-7-days/>=3-sessions semantics (0-more unreachable; N=3 shows On track, pinned); new label scoped to source==='optimal' only, typical fallback untouched and still pinned; no other surface pins old strings (one frozen v0.1.0 acceptance-record hit, intentionally historical); .dashboard-card-subtitle exists, --color-text-muted, ADR 004 compliant; tests load-bearing (reverting either string fails them). Full suite 267 green cold-cache in scratch worktree. Notes (non-blocking): threshold 3 now hardcoded in copy+frontend+backend (pre-existing coupling, more visible; constant if ever configurable); frozen acceptance doc retains old wording. SECURITY: none — exactly 4 files, static literals into JSX text, no sink/dep/endpoint.

--- Post-review delta ---
Branch updated onto dev after #133/#136 merges (disjoint; clean merge). No code changes in the update.

findings.summary: Red-light threshold 3 hardcoded in copy + frontend + backend (pre-existing coupling, now more visible)
findings.reason: Pre-existing; worth a shared constant only if the threshold ever becomes configurable.

findings.summary: Frozen v0.1.0 acceptance record retains the superseded badge wording
